ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrencies" (
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the cryptocurrency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the cryptocurrency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the cryptocurrency was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the cryptocurrency's details were last updated */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  "circulating_supply" TEXT /* Current circulating supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "total_supply" TEXT /* Total supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "max_supply" TEXT /* Maximum supply of the cryptocurrency, if applicable */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the cryptocurrency's logo or image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency being tracked */,
  "epoch" INTEGER /* Epoch time of the market data */,
  "amount" REAL /* Trading volume of the cryptocurrency */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "price_eur" REAL /* Price of the cryptocurrency in EUR */,
  "price_usd" REAL /* Price of the cryptocurrency in USD */,
  "price_aud" REAL /* Price of the cryptocurrency in AUD */,
  "price_jpy" REAL /* Price of the cryptocurrency in JPY */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the cryptocurrency in the given market on the specified date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the cryptocurrency in the given market on the specified date */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the cryptocurrency in the given market on the specified date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the cryptocurrency in the given market on the specified date */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume of the cryptocurrency in the given market on the specified date */,
  "market" TEXT /* Specific market (e.g., EUR, USD, AUD, JPY) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the market data was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the market data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the portfolio was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the portfolio was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_items" (
  "portfolio_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio item */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the cryptocurrency in the portfolio */,
  "average_cost" REAL /* Average cost of the cryptocurrency in the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the portfolio item was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the portfolio item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_items_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_items_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency */,
  "alert_price" REAL /* The price at which the user wants to be alerted */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., above, below) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the alert is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was set */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_alerts_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)
